title: Probability Models and Stochastic Processes · Mastery Check
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving reliability and arrival processes. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a reproducible stochastic models computational study. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate continuous random variables in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive joint conditional in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute limit theorems in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.

steps.title: Calculate the unfamiliar quantity
steps.instruction: An outcome pays $40 with probability 0.40 and $0 otherwise. Calculate its expected value.
steps.why: A numerical result is not complete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Weight each outcome by its probability: 40 × 0.40 + 0 × 0.60.

content.title: Before calculating
content.text: Predict the sign and approximate magnitude. Enter the requested quantity with a unit, then compare it with that prediction.

hints: Weight each outcome by its probability: 40 × 0.40 + 0 × 0.60.
Keep full working precision and round only the final reported value.
The accepted result is within 0.01 of the exact value and includes $ or dollars.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Poisson Processes applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
